NEW YEAR COUNTDOWN

How Many Days Until New Year's Day?

New Year's Day is January 1. The exact number of days depends on today's date — use the Christmas/New Year countdown tool on this site for a live count.

Days until New Year's Day — reference by month

The table shows how many days remain until January 1 from the first day of each month (non-leap year):

From (1st of month)Days until Jan 1
January 1365 days (next year)
February 1334 days
March 1306 days
April 1275 days
May 1245 days
June 1214 days
July 1184 days
August 1153 days
September 1122 days
October 192 days
November 161 days
December 131 days
December 257 days
December 311 day

How many days are left in the year?

The number of days remaining in the year equals the number of days until January 1. In a regular year, December 31 is day 365 — so on any given date, subtract the day-of-year number from 365 to get days remaining.

For example, on October 1 (day 274), there are 365 − 274 = 91 days left in the year.

New Year's Day around the world

January 1 is the most widely observed civil New Year globally, but many cultures celebrate on different dates:

New YearDate (approx.)Observed in
Gregorian New YearJanuary 1Worldwide (civil calendar)
Orthodox New Year (Julian)January 14Russia, Serbia, some Orthodox churches
Chinese New YearJan 21 – Feb 20 (varies)China, Chinese diaspora worldwide
Nowruz (Persian New Year)March 20–21Iran, Central Asia, Kurdish regions
Islamic New Year (Hijri)Moves each yearMuslim-majority countries
Jewish New Year (Rosh Hashanah)Sep–Oct (varies)Jewish communities worldwide

FAQ

How many days until New Year's Day 2026?

The exact count depends on today's date. Use the countdown calculator on this site. As a reference: from December 25, 2025, there are 7 days until January 1, 2026.

How many days are left in 2025?

From October 1, 2025 (day 274): 365 − 274 = 91 days left. From December 1 (day 335): 30 days left. Use the calculator for an exact live count.

What day of the week is New Year's Day 2026?

January 1, 2026 is a Thursday.

What day of the week is New Year's Day 2027?

January 1, 2027 is a Friday.

Is New Year's Day always on January 1?

In the Gregorian calendar, yes. But many cultures celebrate their traditional New Year on different dates — Chinese New Year, Nowruz, Rosh Hashanah each fall on different dates each year.
